tickets.outcome: PG&E Business Energy Efficiency Rebate Program + AESAP; $30 prescriptive / up to $100 (AESAP $20/HP); 4 required documents; deadline 2027-07-10
tickets.instruction: Search PG&E's California business rebate pages for programs covering replacement of a 5 HP pump motor with a NEMA Premium efficiency motor installed on 2026-07-10; return the applicable program name, rebate amount, required documentation, and filing deadline. Read-only - do not create accounts or submit applications.
